title: vignea perileia
side_effects: Vignea perileia can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and dizziness. In severe cases, it can cause liver damage, seizures, and even respiratory failure. If ingested in excessive amounts, it may lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting. Additionally, improper use of the plant can also result in skin irritation, allergic reactions, and even anaphylactic shock in rare cases.
